leadText: Cabo Poco (Japanese: コサジタウン Kosaji Town) is a small town on a cape in the south of the Paldea region. It is the hometown of the player and their rival, Nemona, in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. It connects to Poco Path to the north.

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Contents 1 Places of interest 1.1 Player's house 1.2 Nemona's house 1.3 Private beach Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Cabo Poco The player's house Player's house [ edit | edit source ] The player starts the game in their house , having recently moved to Paldea . The player can obtain two sandwich recipes at the house over the course of the game's story. Talking to Mom will give the player the ability to use the recipes. The first one is unlocked after earning three Gym Badges , while the other one is available after becoming a Champion . Nemona's house [ edit | edit source ] Nemona 's house is located down a path from the player's house. The player chooses their first partner Pokémon in front of it. Private beach [ edit | edit source ] There's a beach located behind Nemona's house. On it lies a battlefield, where the player and Nemona have their first battle. It is also a random battle background for Ranked Battles.
